◎简　　介  

　　Ashwin (Jeeva), a young, energetic photojournalist working for the private newspaper "Dina Anjal", witnesses how Naxalites rob a local bank. He manages to take photos of the robbers and while escaping, is stopped by a young woman (Karthika Nair) who mistakenly assumes he is the culprit and helps the robbers take his camera.
